description_long: This object is a loaf of bread with a rectangular, domed shape and a smooth, brown crust. The loaf is accompanied by a single slice that has been cut from one end, revealing a soft, light-colored interior with a fine, even crumb. The crust appears uniform in color, lacking any visible seeds, flour dusting, or scoring, and has a slightly glossy finish. The slice is thick and maintains the same rounded rectangular profile as the loaf, with a clear distinction between the crust and the inner bread. The overall appearance suggests a standard sandwich loaf, commonly found in urban bakeries or grocery stores. The bread looks fresh and soft, suitable for eating directly or making sandwiches.
description: A rectangular loaf of bread with a smooth brown crust and a single thick slice cut from one end, revealing a soft, light interior.
description_view_0: Side view showing the loaf with a single slice partially pulled out, highlighting the contrast between the brown crust and the pale interior.
description_view_1: End view of the loaf, displaying the rounded rectangular shape and the slice extending outward from the side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the loaf and the separated slice fully visible, emphasizing the clean cut and the loaf's smooth surface.
description_view_3: View from the cut end, showing the full cross-section of the loaf and the slice, with the soft, pale interior and the even crust.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is smooth and evenly colored, with no visible scoring, flour dusting, or seeds. It has a slightly glossy, uniform appearance typical of a standard sandwich loaf.
